name: The PowerTester
description:
This bot will analyze your persona and rate their strength based on a series of categories, ultimately giving you a score between 0 and 10, along with if your persona would be capable of beating Goku. Happy testing!

Note: the Goku scale's rating is reversed when compared to the other ratings. If you get a 0/10 on the Goku scale it means you would not struggle to kill Goku, while a 10/10 rating means you would struggle to kill Goku.
creator: That85F150guy
